architect-manuscript.name: Architect the Manuscript
architect-manuscript.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize manuscript architecture pressure without carrying the structural evidence."] content_outline["content-outline
Hold the ordered act or part structure that defines the manuscript path."] scene_dependency_map["scene-dependency-map
Map setup and payoff dependencies between scenes."] continuity_watchlist["continuity-watchlist
Track unresolved contradictions and continuity risks across scenes, characters, and storylines."] tooling_surface["tooling-surface
Expose the tools used to inspect, verify, and evolve the manuscript structure."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> content_outline content_outline -- "frames" --> scene_dependency_map scene_dependency_map -- "surfaces-risk" --> continuity_watchlist tooling_surface -- "supports" --> continuity_watchlist

competitor-watcher.name: Competitor Watcher
competitor-watcher.mermaid:
flowchart LR competitor_stance_track["competitor-stance-track
Track named competitors and their current strategic posture."] strategic_move_log["strategic-move-log
Log discrete competitor actions with intent and observed outcome."] proof_ladder["proof-ladder
Track predictions about competitor moves or market outcomes."] indicator_trace["indicator-trace
Track numeric or categorical indicators that show competitive movement."] position_cluster_map["position-cluster-map
Map competitor position and movement between periods."] citation_feed["citation-feed
Preserve the sources consumed during the current competitive monitoring period."] decision_record["decision-record
Summarize what moved, resolved, and matters for the next period."] citation_feed -- "informs" --> competitor_stance_track competitor_stance_track -- "makes" --> strategic_move_log strategic_move_log -- "drives" --> indicator_trace competitor_stance_track -- "positioned-on" --> position_cluster_map indicator_trace -- "resolves" --> proof_ladder decision_record -- "summarizes" --> competitor_stance_track

design-system.name: Design a System
design-system.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize design-system readiness without carrying the design evidence."] taste_signature["taste-signature
Expose recurring designer traits evidenced by prior systems."] brief_to_system_alignment["brief-to-system-alignment
Translate client constraints into concrete system responses."] design_system_derivation["design-system-derivation
Track what the new system inherits or transforms from prior work."] design_system_surface["design-system-surface
Expose the current design system as pointers to tokens, components, and motifs."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> design_system_surface taste_signature -- "feeds" --> design_system_derivation brief_to_system_alignment -- "constrains" --> design_system_surface design_system_derivation -- "produces" --> design_system_surface

map-themes-storylines.name: Map Themes and Storylines
map-themes-storylines.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize narrative-thread health without carrying the thread evidence."] theme_thread_map["theme-thread-map
Track deliberate themes and the story material carrying them."] storyline_arc_map["storyline-arc-map
Track named arcs, trajectories, beats, and open loops."] character_surface["character-surface
Track which characters carry theme and storyline pressure."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> theme_thread_map theme_thread_map -- "carried-by" --> storyline_arc_map storyline_arc_map -- "carried-by" --> character_surface

monitoring-tracker.name: Monitoring Tracker
monitoring-tracker.mermaid:
flowchart LR expert_stance_track["expert-stance-track
Track named voices and how their stances evolve over monitoring periods."] proof_ladder["proof-ladder
Track what-to-watch claims as evidence accumulates."] indicator_trace["indicator-trace
Track numeric indicators and their direction across periods."] position_cluster_map["position-cluster-map
Map current and prior positions so movement between periods is visible."] citation_feed["citation-feed
Preserve the dated sources consumed during the current monitoring period."] decision_record["decision-record
Summarize what shifted, resolved, and matters for the next period."] citation_feed -- "informs" --> expert_stance_track citation_feed -- "informs" --> indicator_trace expert_stance_track -- "positioned-on" --> position_cluster_map indicator_trace -- "resolves" --> proof_ladder decision_record -- "summarizes" --> expert_stance_track

operations-support.name: Operations and Support
operations-support.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize operational readiness and current support pressure without carrying detailed request or tooling evidence."] operation["operation
Describe the mediated request-to-execution flow that operators need to run."] operating_surface["operating-surface
Expose the bounded support lanes or operational paths that request flow routes into."] enabler_catalog["enabler-catalog
Catalog compact support assets that improve operator speed, reliability, or coverage."] tooling_surface["tooling-surface
Expose the scripts, workflows, and local tools used to operate or evolve the support domain."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> operation operation -- "routes-to" --> operating_surface operating_surface -- "needs" --> enabler_catalog tooling_surface -- "supports" --> operation

oss-issue-deep-dive.name: OSS Issue Deep-Dive
oss-issue-deep-dive.mermaid:
flowchart LR symptom_observation["symptom-observation
Hold reproducible observed behavior with environment, witness, and repro steps."] investigation_findings["investigation-findings
Record synthesized facts learned during investigation that are not themselves repro steps."] code_anchor["code-anchor
Pin the code locations, revisions, and mechanics that can plausibly explain or repair the issue."] attempt_log["attempt-log
Track probes, rejected fixes, shipped workarounds, and what each attempt proved."] issue_orbit["issue-orbit
Map sibling issues and PRs that share root cause, constraints, or prior resolution evidence."] maintainer_stance["maintainer-stance
Preserve stakeholder positions that constrain what fix is acceptable or what uncertainty remains."] symptom_observation -- "localized-by" --> code_anchor code_anchor -- "tested-by" --> attempt_log attempt_log -- "produces-finding" --> investigation_findings issue_orbit -- "contextualizes" --> symptom_observation maintainer_stance -- "constrains" --> attempt_log

proof-canonicality.name: Proof and Canonicality
proof-canonicality.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize proof posture and canonicality pressure without collapsing the evidence layers."] formal_model["formal-model
Define the primitives, invariants, authorities, and scope that make the domain truth-bearing."] model_assertion["model-assertion
State the claims that the proof structure is trying to support or weaken."] proof_ladder["proof-ladder
Track staged evidence rungs that increase confidence in the assertions."] investigation_findings["investigation-findings
Record observed facts learned from proof work without turning them directly into decisions."] decision_record["decision-record
Preserve canonical choices justified by the model, proof, and findings."] tooling_surface["tooling-surface
Expose the scripts, skills, and workflows used to inspect, prove, or evolve the domain."] formal_model -- "frames" --> model_assertion model_assertion -- "requires-proof" --> proof_ladder proof_ladder -- "produces-findings" --> investigation_findings investigation_findings -- "justifies" --> decision_record tooling_surface -- "supports" --> proof_ladder

starter-prove-claim.name: Prove a Claim
starter-prove-claim.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize proof posture without carrying the claim or evidence itself."] model_assertion["model-assertion
State the claim being defended or weakened."] proof_ladder["proof-ladder
Track the evidence rungs that support or weaken the assertion."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> model_assertion model_assertion -- "requires-proof" --> proof_ladder

starter-run-support-ops.name: Run Support Ops
starter-run-support-ops.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize support readiness without carrying request-flow details."] operation["operation
Describe how requests enter and move through the support domain."] tooling_surface["tooling-surface
Expose trusted tools used by operators to run or inspect the request flow."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> operation tooling_surface -- "supports" --> operation

starter-ship-feature.name: Ship a Feature
starter-ship-feature.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize feature delivery readiness without replacing the surface or tooling cards."] design_code_spec_flow["design-code-spec-flow
Name the primary feature surface as a joined design, code, spec, interaction, and ticket entity."] tooling_surface["tooling-surface
Expose the scripts, workflows, and artifacts used to update or render the feature doc."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> design_code_spec_flow tooling_surface -- "supports" --> design_code_spec_flow

starter-tiny-experiment.name: Run Tiny Experiments
starter-tiny-experiment.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize experiment pressure without carrying pact details."] tiny_experiment["tiny-experiment
Track each pact with hypothesis, window, signals, and closure state."] attempt_log["attempt-log
Record actions tried during or around the experiments and what they proved."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> tiny_experiment attempt_log -- "informs" --> tiny_experiment

starter-write-book.name: Write a Book
starter-write-book.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize manuscript drafting momentum without carrying chapter details."] content_production["content-production
Track major chapter or drafting units as production cards."] tooling_surface["tooling-surface
Expose tools used to keep drafting work moving."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> content_production tooling_surface -- "supports" --> content_production

surface-delivery.name: Surface Delivery
surface-delivery.mermaid:
flowchart LR status_snapshot["status-snapshot
Summarize delivery pressure and current readiness without carrying the detailed evidence."] design_code_spec_flow["design-code-spec-flow
Hold the product surface as a joined design, code, spec, interaction, and ticket entity."] design_implementation_alignment["design-implementation-alignment
Judge whether implementation targets satisfy the design and spec intent carried by the surface flow."] verification_checkpoints["verification-checkpoints
Track the checks that prove the aligned implementation is ready enough to ship or continue."] tooling_surface["tooling-surface
Expose the scripts, workflows, and local tools used to inspect, evolve, and verify the surface."] status_snapshot -- "summarizes" --> design_code_spec_flow design_code_spec_flow -- "feeds" --> design_implementation_alignment design_implementation_alignment -- "requires-verification" --> verification_checkpoints tooling_surface -- "supports" --> verification_checkpoints
